---
name: EpiBench result bundle submission
about: Submit a result bundle for EpiBench certification review
title: "[EpiBench Result Bundle] "
labels: epibench,result-bundle,certification
assignees: ""
---

## Result identity

- Run ID:
- EpiBench version:
- Track: D / W / F / E
- Requested claim: E0 / E1 / E2-PD / E2-PI / E3 / E4

## Bundle links

- Dataset card:
- Split manifest:
- Failure trace:
- Result bundle:
- Claim eligibility report if already generated:
- Reproduction command:

## Model and environment

- Model name:
- Model family:
- Commit SHA:
- Hardware target if edge or real-time is claimed:
- Environment/container:

## Primary metrics

- Event sensitivity:
- False alarms per 24h:
- Precision/F1:
- Latency median/p95:
- Calibration metrics if applicable:
- Missing/failure rate:

## Failure transparency

- [ ] Prediction missing cases preserved
- [ ] Crashes preserved
- [ ] NaN/Inf outputs checked
- [ ] Leakage checked
- [ ] Split compliance checked
- [ ] Hardware evidence supplied if claiming edge/real-time

## Anti-overclaim confirmation

- [ ] The submission does not claim clinical approval.
- [ ] The submission does not claim generalization without external validation.
- [ ] The submission does not claim real-time/edge readiness without measured hardware evidence.
- [ ] The final claim is generated by EpiBench rules, not manually selected.
